message:
test(widgets): add 24 unit tests for constraint and debug overlays

9 tests for constraint_overlay (style defaults, label formatting,
bounds display, clipping, rendering toggles) and 15 tests for
debug_overlay (toggle, clear, format_label, wrapper accessors,
disabled state, hover, options/palette defaults).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
